name: Squid Dash
author: Poki
description: Squid Dash is a physics game where you control a speedy squid that blasts ink to propel itself forward! Time your squirts just right to travel as far as possible, unlock cool upgrades to boost your squid’s abilities, and see how far you can go with each run. It’s simple, addictive, and always a challenge to beat your best distance. Ready to dash through the city? How to play Squid Dash? Click and hold to aim, release to shoot. Who created Squid Dash? Squid Dash is created by Redox Interactive. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Squid Dash for free? You can play Squid Dash for free on Poki. Can I play Squid Dash on mobile devices and desktop? Squid Dash can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
